summary: Completed comprehensive testing of YachtAssist bug fixes and email integration. Both critical bugs fixed successfully.
passed_tests: Demo login functionality for owner and technician
Bug Fix 1: /api/yachts/{yacht_id} endpoint returns correct yacht data
Bug Fix 1: Ticket detail page shows 'Suerte (Sanlorenzo 50)' instead of 'Nessuna imbarcazione ()'
Bug Fix 2: Generic tickets show 'In attesa del preventivo del tecnico' when quote_items is null
Owner dashboard displays correct yacht information
Ticket workflow (create, assign, close) working correctly
Email registration endpoint functional with JWT token generation
All backend API endpoints returning expected status codes
Frontend navigation and UI interactions working properly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (12/12 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all critical UI flows working)
